# Summary

Carrot experienced significant losses from a Drift protocol exploit, causing ~50% CRT token depreciation to ~$57.65. The team paused mint/redeem functions pending clarity while Boost and Turbo products remained unaffected. Marketing emphasized wealth-building features and long-term performance metrics.

tweets.fullText:
1/ Update on Carrot following the Drift exploit.

The Drift exploit hit Carrot hard. Assuming no fund recovery, CRT holders are facing a ~50% loss, which makes the adjusted price ~$57.65.

Here's where things stand and what we're doing next
tweets.aiAnalysis: The thread format with a concrete loss metric (50%) and transparent damage assessment created urgency and trust, driving bookmarks from holders seeking detailed recovery information, but the lack of visual breakdown or actionable recovery timeline limited retweet/share momentum among broader observers.

tweets.fullText:

We have paused mint/redeem functions at this time until we can gain more clarity and will update with  information when we have it. 

All Boost and Turbo products are unaffected
